notes: Platform launch. First published values. No prior week for delta.

EMERGENCY UPDATE. US and Israel launched joint strikes on Iran (Operation Shield of Judah). First direct US-Iran military conflict. Tehran struck. Iran retaliated across Gulf states. Strait of Hormuz disrupted. Trade Stress 62->79. Info Integrity 61.4->54.2. Largest single-event Edge spike in index history. First unscheduled intra-week update.

ISSUE 2 - Week 2. US-Iran war Day 11. Khamenei killed Feb 28. Son Mojtaba elected new Supreme Leader Mar 8. Iran deaths 1255+ confirmed (IRCS). 10000+ injured. 26/31 provinces struck. Iran fired 500+ missiles and ~2000 drones. Hormuz closed. IEA releases 400M bbl reserves (largest in history). Brent peaked $104 now $91. Hezbollah re-engaged Lebanon. Trade Stress 79->88. Info Integrity 54.2->51.8. Calm Window 12%->6%.

ISSUE 3 - Day 24. Deaths 1444+ (204 children IRCS). Hormuz closed - 21 vessel attacks (UKMTO). Brent peaked $119 now $101. Trump 5-day pause on power plant strikes citing productive talks. Iran denied talks. Oman mediating. Witkoff+Kushner leading US side. Qatar Ras Laffan LNG -17% capacity. Calm Window 6%->14% on first genuine off-ramp signal.

ISSUE 4 - Day 75. Trump-Xi Beijing summit. Xi pledges Iran leverage. China buys 90% of Iran oil. Ceasefire since Apr 8 on massive life support. Lebanon escalating - IDF crossed Litani. Regional deaths 6500+ (Iran 3400+ Lebanon 2700+). Brent peaked $138 now $105. 20000 seafarers stranded Hormuz. Saudi output lowest since 1990. Hantavirus MV Hondius - 11 cases 3 dead 38% CFR CDC Level 3. Calm Window record jump +20pts on Beijing summit signal.

ISSUE 5 - Day 103. Fragile de-escalation. Ceasefire broke open Jun 7-8 - worst Israel-Iran exchange in months. US strikes resumed Jun 8-10; Iran hit US facilities in Bahrain, Jordan, Kuwait; Trump pledged further strikes while pushing a ceasefire framework against Israel-hawk resistance. Lebanon ceasefire (Jun 4) shaky - Hezbollah leadership rejected it, IDF soldier killed day one. Counter-signals: Iran declared ops vs Israel over Jun 7, Iranian airspace normal, Hormuz ship traffic increasing per US Energy Secretary Jun 9, Brent ~93 (from 138 peak), EIA assumes Hormuz reopen Q3. WoE holds 88 - kinetic flare offsets trade easing. CW 34->31 - off-ramp intact but fragility demonstrated. WG holds 47.
